retirement_templates.tpl_1: {name} closes a career at {age} after {career_matches} professional matches, {career_goals} goals scored, {career_assists} assists, and a path crossing {clubs_count} club(s). Predominantly wearing the {primary_club} shirt, {trait_phrase} was the trademark no one will forget. {achievements_phrase} {moments_phrase} Leaves the pitch making football richer than they found it — numbers, memories, and the kind of story fans keep telling long after the final whistle.
retirement_templates.tpl_2: At {age}, {name} hung up the boots with the calm of someone who did what needed to be done. {career_matches} matches played, {career_goals} goals to the count, {career_assists} assists distributed to teammates. {primary_club} was the main stage of a career that mixed consistency, technical quality, and high moments when the crowd needed them most. {achievements_phrase} {moments_phrase} {trait_phrase} stays as identity trait — an attribute only those who watched fully understand.
retirement_templates.tpl_3: {name} retires at {age}, closing the book with {career_matches} matches, {career_goals} goals, and {career_assists} assists. {clubs_phrase}, leaving in each one something of his own signature. {achievements_phrase} {moments_phrase} {trait_phrase} sustained every important performance, and the legacy goes beyond numbers — it lives in the memory of those who lived alongside every win, every hard defeat, and every memorable night within the four lines.
retirement_templates.tpl_4: Career closed at {age} for {name}: {career_matches} matches, {career_goals} goals, {career_assists} assists in a journey crossing {clubs_count} club(s). {primary_club} was the main home — where the most marking moments happened and where the crowd raised the name high many times. {achievements_phrase} {moments_phrase} Leaves with {trait_phrase} as the adjective that best summarizes everything delivered on the pitch. A chapter ends, longing begins.
retirement_templates.tpl_5: {name} closes at {age} a career of {career_matches} matches, {career_goals} goals, and {career_assists} assists — numbers telling part of the story, but far from telling everything. {primary_club} was where most history was made, and {clubs_phrase} compose the full trajectory. {achievements_phrase} {moments_phrase} {trait_phrase} was the technical calling card separating this athlete from the merely regular — and what will stay for fans when the name comes up in late-night conversations.
retirement_templates.tpl_6: Hung up the boots at {age}: {name}, athlete who played {career_matches} games, scored {career_goals} goals, and delivered {career_assists} assists in a career filled with memorable plays. For {primary_club}, left a permanent mark. {achievements_phrase} {moments_phrase} {trait_phrase} became synonymous with the name among those who followed the League round after round. Retirement closing one cycle and opening space for new athletes to try to reach what he built.
retirement_templates.tpl_7: {name} said goodbye at {age}, and the numbers speak loud: {career_matches} matches, {career_goals} goals, {career_assists} assists — totals carrying the weight of every decisive play. Most of the trajectory at {primary_club}, with {clubs_count} club(s) total. {achievements_phrase} {moments_phrase} {trait_phrase} was present in every phase of the career — kid, consolidated starter, respected veteran. Leaves as a reference for those who come.
retirement_templates.tpl_8: Retired {name} at {age}, closing a career of {career_matches} professional matches. {career_goals} goals scored, {career_assists} assists delivered, and moments that will produce talk for years. {primary_club} was where the name gained weight, and the body of work justifies the respect carried at the end. {achievements_phrase} {moments_phrase} {trait_phrase} stays as inheritance for the future — an attribute few have and that no one forgets when seeing it on the pitch.
